Off Calendar Jun-10-2026 Continued To Aug-19-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Verleana Green for Michael Johnson -Rome, petitioner (via zoom).
Lafaye Maxey appeared in pro per (via zoom).

Discussion was held regarding a copy of the trust not provided to petitioner's counsel, that Ms. Maxey shall mail a copy of the trust and will to counsel, that Ms. Maxey will file a copy with the courts, and that counsel shall file a declaration for appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem.

The Court encourages Ms, Maxey to file a response with the Court.

The matter is continued to August 19, 2026, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
